module_info.docstring:
Skill slash commands — scan installed skills and build invocation messages.

Shared between CLI (cli.py) and gateway (gateway/run.py) so both surfaces
can invoke skills via /skill-name commands.

functions.name: scan_skill_commands
functions.docstring:
Scan ~/.hermes/skills/ and return a mapping of /command -> skill info.

Returns:
    Dict mapping "/skill-name" to {name, description, skill_md_path, skill_dir}.

functions.name: get_skill_commands
functions.docstring: Return the current skill commands mapping (scan first if empty).

functions.name: build_skill_invocation_message
functions.docstring:
Build the user message content for a skill slash command invocation.

Args:
    cmd_key: The command key including leading slash (e.g., "/gif-search").
    user_instruction: Optional text the user typed after the command.

Returns:
    The formatted message string, or None if the skill wasn't found.
